7 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_APPLI_IAPPSERVICEMNG_H
8 #define ARCGEOSIM_APPLI_IAPPSERVICEMNG_H
21 #include <arcane/utils/ListImpl.h>
22 #include <arcane/utils/String.h>
23 #include <arcane/IService.h>
24 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
25 #include <arcane/CaseOptionService.h>
26 
27 #include <typeinfo>
28 #include <map>
29 
30 namespace Arcane {
31  class ITimeLoopMng;
32  class IServiceMng;
33 }
34 
35 #ifdef ARCGEOSIM_USE_EXPORT
36 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/ArcGeoSim_appliExport.h"
37 #else
38 #define ARCGEOSIM_APPLI_EXPORT

40 
41 using namespace Arcane;
42 
43 class IAppServiceMng
44 {
45 private:
46 
47  class Pointer
48  {
49  public:
50  virtual ~Pointer() {}
51  };
52 
53  template<typename T>
54  class PointerT : public Pointer
55  {
56  public:
57  PointerT(T* p)
58  : m_pointer(p)
59  , m_delete_in_dtr(false) {}
60  PointerT(const T& p)
61  : m_pointer(new T(p))
62  , m_delete_in_dtr(true) {}
63  virtual ~PointerT() {
64  if(m_delete_in_dtr)
65  delete m_pointer;
66  }
67  T* pointer() { return m_pointer; }
68  private:
69  T* m_pointer;
70  bool m_delete_in_dtr;
71  };
72 
73  typedef std::shared_ptr<Pointer> SharedPointer;
74 
75  typedef ListImplT< std::pair<SharedPointer,bool> > PointerList;
76  typedef PointerList::iterator iterator;
77 
78 public:
79 
81  IAppServiceMng();
82 
84  virtual ~IAppServiceMng() {}
85 
86 protected:
87 
88  void registerInstance() ;
89 
91  virtual void initializeAppServiceMng() = 0;
92 
93 public:
94 
96  ARCANE_DEPRECATED void addService(Arcane::IService* service);
97 
99  ARCANE_DEPRECATED void addService(Arcane::IService* service, const String & type_name);
100 
102  void addMissingServiceInfo(const String & type_id, const String & type_name);
103 
104  /* VERSION 2 => meilleure encapsulation :
105  - les typeid ne sont pas externes
106  - on peut enlever les services manquants si ajout
107  - prise en charge du dynamiccast
108  */
109 
111  template<typename T> void addService(T* service)
112  {
113  _traceMng()->debug() << "Adding shared service "
114  << typeid(*service).name() << " (" << service << ")";
115 
116  _addService(service);
117  }
118 
120  template<typename T> void addService(const T& service)
121  {
122  _traceMng()->debug() << "Adding shared service "
123  << typeid(service).name() << " (" << &service << ")";
124 
125  _addService(service);
126  }
127 
129  template<typename T> void addService(T* service, const String & type_name)
130  {
131  _traceMng()->debug() << "Adding shared service "
132  << typeid(*service).name() << " for "
133  << type_name << " (" << service << ")";
134 
135  _addService(service);
136  }
137 
139  template<typename T> void addService(const T& service, const String & type_name)
140  {
141  _traceMng()->debug() << "Adding shared service "
142  << typeid(service).name() << " for "
143  << type_name << " (" << &service << ")";
144 
145  _addService(service);
146  }
147 
149  template<typename T> void addMissingServiceInfo(const String & type_name)
150  {
151  // Par souci de compatibilit�, on utilise T* et non T
152  addMissingServiceInfo(typeid(T*).name(), type_name);
153  }
154 
156  template<typename T> void addOptionalService(const Arcane::CaseOptionMultiServiceT<T>& option,
157  const String & type_name)
158  {
159  if(option.size() > 0) {
160  if(option.size() != 1)
161  _traceMng()->fatal() << "Multiple shared services defined";
162  addService(option[0], type_name);
163  } else
164  addMissingServiceInfo(typeid(T*).name(), type_name);
165  }
166 
168 
171  template<class T>
172  T* find(bool delegate_error)
173  {
174  if (delegate_error)
175  _checkBeforeFind(typeid(T*).name());
176 
177  for(iterator iter=m_services.begin(); iter!=m_services.end(); ++iter)
178  {
179  Pointer* s = iter->first.get();
180  {
181  T* m = NULL;
182  PointerT<Arcane::IService>* generic_m = dynamic_cast<PointerT<Arcane::IService>*>(s);
183  if(generic_m == NULL) {
184  // Cas enregistrement service nouvelle version
185  PointerT<T>* p = dynamic_cast<PointerT<T>*>(s);
186  if(p != NULL)
187  m = p->pointer();
188  } else {
189  // Cas enregistrement service ancienne version
190  m = dynamic_cast<T*>(generic_m->pointer());
191  }
192  if (m)
193  {
194  if((*iter).second) // true si pas encore initialis�
195  {
196  m->init();
197  (*iter).second = false ; // m�morisation de l'initialisation
198  }
199  return m ;
200  }
201  }
202  }
203 
204  if (delegate_error)
205  _checkNotFound(typeid(T).name());
206 
207  return NULL ;
208  }
209 
211  void setTimeLoopMng(ITimeLoopMng * time_loop_mng);
212 
217  static IAppServiceMng * instance(IServiceMng * sm = NULL, bool fatal_if_not_found = true);
218 
223  virtual bool isContinue() const { return false; }
224 
225 private:
226 
227  void _removeMissingServiceInfo(const String & type_id);
228 
229  void _checkBeforeFind(const char * name);
230  void _checkNotFound(const char * name);
231 
232  Arcane::ITraceMng * _traceMng();
233 
234  template<typename T> void _addService(T* service)
235  {
236  ARCANE_ASSERT((service != NULL),("Service pointer null"));
237 
238  // Ajout du service
239  SharedPointer p(new PointerT<T>(service));
240  m_services.add(std::pair<SharedPointer,bool>(p,true));
241 
242  // On retire de la liste des services manquants
243  _removeMissingServiceInfo(typeid(T*).name());
244  }
245 
246  template<typename T> void _addService(const T& service)
247  {
248  // Ajout du service
249  SharedPointer p(new PointerT<T>(service));
250  m_services.add(std::pair<SharedPointer,bool>(p,true));
251 
252  // On retire de la liste des services manquants
253  _removeMissingServiceInfo(typeid(T*).name());
254  }
255 
256 private:
257  PointerList m_services;
258  std::map<String,String> m_missing_service_infos;
259  ITimeLoopMng * m_time_loop_mng;
260  static ARCGEOSIM_APPLI_EXPORT IAppServiceMng * m_instance;
261 };
262 
263 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_APPLI_IAPPSERVICEMNG_H */
